title: Voyager 1 launches
blurb: Sixteen days after Voyager 2, its twin lifts off on a faster path that will overtake it and reach Jupiter first.

title: Voyager 1 reaches Jupiter
blurb: The faster-launched twin makes its own Jupiter flyby four months ahead of Voyager 2, discovering active volcanoes on Io.

title: First Space Shuttle flight
blurb: Columbia launches on STS-1, opening the era of reusable American spacecraft.

title: Challenger disaster
blurb: The Space Shuttle Challenger breaks apart 73 seconds after launch, killing all seven crew.

title: Chernobyl disaster
blurb: A reactor explosion at the Chernobyl nuclear plant in Soviet Ukraine releases massive radioactive fallout.

title: Fall of the Berlin Wall
blurb: East Germany opens its borders; crowds tear down the wall that had divided the city for 28 years.

title: The "Pale Blue Dot" photograph
blurb: Voyager 1, at Carl Sagan's urging, turns its camera back from 6 billion km out to photograph Earth as a single pixel.

title: Voyager 1 enters interstellar space
blurb: Its twin crosses the heliopause six years before Voyager 2, becoming the first human-made object beyond the Sun's influence.
